$schema_note: BPC federal-simplified-acquisition-best-value takeoff template. Skeleton — fill rooms[] and scope_items[] from the RFQ CLINs + drawings. Each CLIN should map to one or more scope_items.

project.name: {{PROJECT_NAME}}
project.evaluation_subset_note: Often evaluated in groups of 3 lowest priced quotes; price must clear lowest-3 cutoff to get technical + experience read

rooms.name: {{ROOM_NAME}}
rooms.notes: [USER TO FILL per room — purpose, finishes, MEP, takeoff measurements]

scope_items.notes: [Assumptions, source page in spec / SOW, RFI status]

markup._markup_band_note: SAP-tuned: bond lower (no bid bond typical), contingency between LPTA and FAR 15, overhead + profit slightly above LPTA to fund technical-narrative drafting and reflect comparative-tradeoff upside
